rr_undefined: Create a role called 'ded' to be able to play Russian roulette
rr_dead: Dead people can not play Russian roulette
rr_loss: you are dead, the revival will happen in 2 minutes
egg_self: threw an agg at themselves, eggs thrown at
daily_reward: You got the daily reward (‎₴‎100), the next reward will be available in 24 hours
daily_left: Time left until the daily reward:
shop_unavailable: There are no roles available for sale
buy_undefined: you should specify the role you want to buy
buy_error: Error: for some reason this role can not be assigned by a bot, contact a real person to buy it
notenoughcashstranger: you do not have enough money
buy_unavailable: you can not buy that role
pay_person: You should specify the person you are paying to
pay_money: You should specify the amount of money you want to pay
pay_integer: The amount of money should be a positive ineger
top_oneperson: The only person with money on this server:
set_lang: The bot's language is English now
help_owl: `owl` - sends a random photo of a random owl by using Unsplash, that can take some time due to bad performance of the server
help_rr: `rr` - allows you to play Russian roullete, in case of death you become 'ded'
help_prb: `prb <something>` - sends the probability of <something>, the probability is definitely not generated randomly
help_egg: `egg <someone>` - allows you to throw an agg at <someone>
help_money: `money` - shows how many moneys you have
help_daily: `daily` - you get 100 moneys, the cooldown is 24 hours
help_shop: `shop` - lists all the available to buy roles (and that's all it does)
help_buy_role: `buy_role <role>` - allows you to buy a role, <role> - the name of the role without quotation marks
help_pay: `pay <someone> <amount>` - allows you to pay <amount> moneys to <someone>
help_top: `top` - sends list of 5 (or less) richest people on the server
help_main:
! - command prefix
`help` - get this list of commands
`owl` - get a photo of an owl
`rr` - play Russian roulette
`prb <something>` - get the probability of something
`egg <@person>` - throw an egg at someone
`money` - get the amount of money you have
`daily` - collect the daily reward
`shop` - get all the available to buy roles
`buy_role <role>` - allows you to buy the <role> role
`pay <someone> <amount>` - allows you to pay to other people
`top` - shows the richest people on the server
Better command description: `!help <command>`
